For the next 8 seconds, every Noelle unit on the field deals 2.5x damage to anything caught in the frost. There is no going back from here.

Passive.Name: What? Only a Support Unit!?

Ability1.Name: THE NUMBERS GAME, THE FINAL GAME
Ability1.Description: Jevil deals one player in, only one: the most dangerous enemy in range joins his Numbers Game, Numbers Game! Their number comes up, and it reads 1.09x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: METAMORPHOSIS! (DEVILSKNIFE)
Ability2.Description: Jevil folds himself into the Devilsknife and scythes through the strongest enemy in range, one clean cut for 2.87x current Damage. Whatever spills from their pockets is yours, yours, refunding 5% of that as bonus cash.

Passive.Name: CHAOS! CHAOS!
Passive.Description: Jevils Attacks Instantly Kill Enemies With 25% or Less Health, and Bosses with 10% Or Less Health

Ability1.Name: OVER THE EDGE YOU GO
Ability1.Description: King wraps a chained spade around the most dangerous enemy in range, one prisoner at a time, and holds them out past the castle wall just long enough to laugh, dealing 0.86x current Damage. He IS the bad guy. He has been extremely clear about this.

Passive.Name: I'M THE BAD GUY!!!
Passive.Description: All CH1 Towers In Range Of King Are Given A +32.5% Damage Boost (65% If Shiny), and Enemies Hit by King Are Given 10% SoulLeak (20% If Shiny)

Passive.Name: Study Buddies
Passive.Description: Berdly Deals +50% More Damage if paired with Noelle. +250% Damage If Paired With Noelle, Kris, And Susie.

Spamton NEO.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: LOOKS LIKE YOU NEED A [[BIG SHOT]]!

Ability1.Name: NOW'S YOUR CHANCE TO BE A [[Pincushion]]
Ability1.Description: Spamton NEO's puppet strings snap taut and skewer a single valued customer: the most dangerous enemy in range. It's a [[1 Time Offer]] priced at 1.48x current Damage, no refunds.

Ability2.Name: PLEASE HOLD [[forever]]
Ability2.Description: Every enemy in range gets stuck on hold together in a corrupted checkout loop for 9.6s. When the page finally crashes, each one pays 1.67x current Damage in [[Shipping And Handling]].

Passive.Name: [[BIGGER AND BETTER THAN EVER!!]]
Passive.Description: Every 30s Spamton NEO Becomes Enraged, Dealing 3x More Damage For 10s And Making Attacks Apply 3s Darkened Stun.

Ability1.Name: MAXIMUM HONK
Ability1.Description: Thrash Machine remembers every answer you gave when you built it, revs its duck-shaped chassis to MAXIMUM HONK, and flattens one unlucky target, the most dangerous enemy in range, dealing 1.38x current Damage.

Passive.Name: It's Just A Duck?
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 100% Anti-Regen For 10 Seconds, and Enemies Hit by Thrash Machine are given 40% Slow for 3 seconds.

Passive.Name: CatchX
Passive.Description: Attacks Trap Enemies Stunning Them For 0.1 Seconds.

Ability1.Name: The Punishment Room (For Punishing) Lol

Passive.Name: Serial Number: Q5U4EX7YY2E9N
Passive.Description: Every 15s Queen Throws A Puddle Of Acid From Her Cup At A Random Enemy, Dealing 2x Of Her Damage In Splash, Applying 100% Darkness To Effected Enemies For 5s

Ability1.Name: WA HA HA! CATCH!

Ability1.Description: Miss Mizzle declares her reign official, and the sky knows better than to argue. A royal downpour drenches every enemy in range for 1.55x current Damage. Can't be used again for 3.6s.

Passive.Name: Suddenly, the north and east winds blew fiercely.
Passive.Description: Every 5s The Roaring Knight Picks The Currently Targeted Enemy And Instantly Kills Them (x50 Damage & 3s Darkened Stun To Bosses & Mini-Bosses).

Ability1.Name: MUST... KILL...

Ability2.Name: THE FOUNTAIN... PROVIDES...

Ability3.Name: STILL... BURNING...

Ability2.Name: WHERE THE PIXELS END
Ability2.Description: The image swallows every enemy in range into its unrendered black for 7.7s, a dark deeper than the file goes, then deals 1.74x current Damage to each one it spits back out.

Ability3.Name: ha. ha. ha.

Passive.Name: Round 1!
Passive.Description: Attacks Stun Enemies For 1 Second. Every 3rd Attack, Giga Queen Throws a Comically Large Baseball That Does x15 Splash Damage And 100% Anti-Regen.

Hammer Of Justice.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: Gyaa! Ha Ha! Is that all you got kid?

Ability1.Name: GYAA HA HA!! HAVE AT YE!

Ability2.Description: An old shopkeep never swings for free. One well-aimed crack splits the strongest enemy in range like a fresh crab apple, dealing 1.65x current Damage and pocketing 8% of it back as bonus cash.

Ability2.Name: SPEAK TO THE HANDS

Ability2.Name: WELL DONE, KRIS. NOW HOLD STILL.

Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 100% Burn For 1s. Every 15s ERAM Spawns a FRIEND With x50 Of His Current Damage As Its Health

Dess.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: Heh, I’m here to cause some chaos!

Ability1.Name: Bang, Bang!
Ability1.Description: Dess levels two finger-guns at the single biggest troublemaker in range and, bang, bang, it somehow works, dealing 1.13x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: Chaos, As Promised

Passive.Name: A Lost... Lost... Girl...
Passive.Description: Enemies (20 -> 10) Mini-Bosses (50 -> 25) And Bosses (100 -> 50) Do 50% Less Damage When Reaching The Exit.

Ability2.Name: GROUP HUG!!! (STITCHES INCLUDED)

Passive.Name: Give Me My Q's!
Passive.Description: All Towers In Range Are Given A 12% Damage Boost (24% If Shiny), 12% Range Boost (24% If Shiny), and 7% Cooldown Reduction. (14% If Shiny)

Passive.Description: Cat Mike's Damage climbs 50% for every other Mike variant placed, capping at a 100% boost once all three Mikes are deployed together.

Ability1.Name: YEE, And Furthermore, HAW
Ability1.Description: Cowboy Hat Mike squints under the brim, spits into the dust, and fans the hammer at the one most dangerous enemy in range, dealing 0.84x current Damage. This town ain't big enough for a fourth Mike.

Passive.Name: Mike, Party of Three
Passive.Description: Cowboy Hat Mike hits 50% harder with one more Mike on the field, and 100% harder once the full three-Mike lineup is assembled.

Ability1.Name: Do You Hear It?
Ability1.Description: One clean note, pitched like a gavel-strike, lands square on the single most dangerous enemy in range for 1.66x current Damage. Court is in session.

Ability2.Name: Hold The Note
Ability2.Description: Every enemy in range is Muted beneath a single held frequency for 8.6s. When the note finally breaks, so do they; each takes 2.22x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Ripple
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 5s Of Darkened Stun.

Ability1.Name: FREE HUGS (VELOCITY: MAXIMUM)

Passive.Name: WHY DIDN'T YOU PUSH HIM?
Passive.Description: Attacks Have A 33.3% Chance To Cause A Random Effect (50% Slow For 1s, 0.5s Stun, 15% SoulLeak For 1s)

Passive.Name: Slumber Party!

Passive.Name: Dodge!

Passive.Name: Sound Check!
Passive.Description: Every 3rd Attack Deals x4 Damage And Applies 60% Slow For 3 Seconds.

Passive.Name: Popularity!
Passive.Description: This Unit Gains A +25% Damage Increase For Every Tower Placed In Its Range (Max 100%). Attacks Deal +100% Burn Damage Over 2 Seconds.

Ability1.Name: TONIGHT'S SPECIAL: CHARCOAL!
Ability1.Description: IT'S COOKING TIME! Chef Tenna picks the most dangerous enemy in range as tonight's featured dish and flambés it live on air until the studio smoke alarm starts singing along, dealing 1.52x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: LOW AND SLOW, FOLKS!
Ability2.Description: Every enemy in range goes straight into the Ratings Oven for 10.1s. When that timer dings, each one comes out taking 3.13x current Damage. Dinner is served!

Passive.Name: IT'S TV TIME!
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 300% Burn Damage Over 1 Second.

Ability1.Name: OH! UM... CHARGE, PLEASE!

Passive.Name: Ralsei Rancher Was Unlocked For Your Castle Town
Passive.Description: Every 15s Horse Ralsei Summons a Mini Version Of Himself That Has x50 Health of His Current Damage.

Ability1.Name: QUICK-DRAW BONUS ROUND!!
Ability1.Description: The studio lights blaze, the cameras swing in, and Cowboy Tenna calls a one-on-one showdown LIVE ON AIR. The single most dangerous enemy in range gets plugged full of prime-time lead for 1.28x current Damage. Now THAT'S good television!

Passive.Name: SHOOT THAT LITTLE MAILMAN!!
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 15% SoulLeak for 1s. +100% More Damage If Paired With Spamton, Scampton The Great Or Spamton NEO

HiddenAbility.Description: A voice that isn't quite Noelle's asks the question one last time, and every enemy in range freezes solid for 8 seconds, permanently slowed by 25% for the rest of the game. For the next 5 seconds, every Noelle unit on the field deals 1.5x damage to anything caught in the frost. There is no going back from here.

Passive.Name: Holiday Spirit
Passive.Description: Noelles Attacks Stun For 0.1 Seconds.

Ability1.Description: Fluffy Ralsei puffs up to triple fluff and flops onto every enemy in range at once; turns out being loved this hard hurts, dealing 1.53x current Damage. Can't be used again for 3.4s.

Passive.Name: Before The Story

Passive.Name: Chalk
Passive.Description: Susie Deals +100% More Damage To enemies In A 10 Stud Radius Of Her

Passive.Name: Bluebird Of Misfortune
Passive.Description: Deals +25% More Damage For The First 5 Rounds Of Placement

Titan Ralsei.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: I’ll protect you… even like this!
Titan Ralsei.VoiceLineSellCaptions: I… can’t hold this form forever.
Titan Ralsei.Ability1VoicelineCaptions: I'll hold you... frozen in light.
Titan Ralsei.Ability3VoicelineCaptions: I'll protect you all, even like this!

Ability1.Name: PACIFY, EVERYONE!
Ability1.Description: Titan Ralsei casts a Pacify wide enough to blanket the whole battlefield; every enemy in range dozes in his soft green glow for 3.4s, then takes 1.34x current Damage the moment they wake.

Ability2.Name: Fluffy Boy, Heavy Paw
Ability2.Description: The paw that used to give hugs comes down flat across every enemy in range instead, dealing 2.18x current Damage. Somewhere under all that stone, he is still sorry.

Ability3.Name: Even Like This, I Can Help!
Ability3.Description: A Heal Prayer hummed through the earth itself steadies every tower in range at once. For 10.4s they gain +12% Damage and +8% Cooldown Reduction.

Passive.Name: A Dark.. Dark... Dark.. Prince Has Awoken...
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 20% SoulLeak For 3 Seconds And 50% Regen For 3 Seconds. Attacks Also Apply 0.5s Stun. Stabs Into The Ground Every 30s Creating A Dark Fountain Dealing x5 AOE Damage To All Enemies In Range. (Voice Actor: SnowzBunz)

Ability1.Name: STEP RIGHT UP FOR THE [[Vanishing Act]]!!
Ability1.Description: SCAMPTON THE GREAT hauls one lucky volunteer, the most dangerous enemy in range, up on stage for his world-famous disappearing trick, dealing 1.19x current Damage. TA-DA!! [[No refunds.]]

Passive.Name: SCARED OF A LITTLE [Change of perspective?]
Passive.Description: Every 5th Attack Perrys A Single Enemy Hit, Turning Them Around With 25% Of Their Health Restored And Making Them Walk Towards The Closet Entrance. (Perrys Do x10 Damage To Bosses)

Susiezilla.Ability2VoicelineCaptions: Aw, I was just getting started!!

Ability1.Name: CHOMP FIRST, ASK NEVER
Ability1.Description: Susiezilla plucks exactly one victim off the field, the most dangerous enemy in range, and chomps down like it's somebody else's lunch, dealing 1.05x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: PROPERTY DAMAGE!!
Ability2.Description: The whole battlefield becomes Susiezilla's mosh pit; one tail-swinging, building-flattening tantrum smashes every enemy in range for 2.4x current Damage. Can't be used again for 10.4s.

Passive.Name: The Atomic Roar Of Darkness And Annihilation
Passive.Description: Susiezilla Charges Her Beam For 5s Causing A Pierce Beam Dealing 2x Her Current Damage In Darkness Every 0.25s For 5s. 45s Recharge.

Passive.Name: The Upper Hand
Passive.Description: Every 60s HANDROMEDA Drops Stars From The Sky Dealing an 5x AOE Attack To All Enemies In Range.

Ability1.Name: BUY ONE CHAOS, GET ONE [[Free]]
Ability1.Description: Spamton corners a single customer, the most dangerous enemy in range, with a [Once In A Lifetime Deal] while Jevil circles behind them, giggling. The fine print charges 1.37x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: A FREEDOM PRISON, [[Now 50% Off]]
Ability2.Description: Jevil locks every enemy in range inside his favorite little freedom prison for 9s. When the door finally swings open, Spamton's [[Cancellation Fee]] collects 1.71x current Damage from each of them.

Passive.Name: [SUDDENLY, THE DEALMAKER AND JEVILSTAIL COME OUT OF YOUR POCKET!]
Passive.Description: Spamton Applies 50% Darkness For 1s And 50% Slow To All Enemies In Range, While Jevil Does A 5x AOE Attack Every 30s That Deals 10% SoulLeak For 5s.

Passive.Name: Mama Miba! Mama SHIBA!
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 100% Burn For 1 Second

Ability1.Name: Krismas Morning High Beams
Ability1.Description: Rudolph cranks the famous family nose to full holiday wattage, pinning the most dangerous enemy in range alone in a spotlight bright enough to land a sleigh by, dealing 1.36x current Damage. Don't tell Noelle he's out of bed.

Passive.Name: A Fathers Love
Passive.Description: Rudolph Holiday Boosts All Units Damage In Range By 25% (50% Shiny) And Does 10% AOE SoulLeak

Snowgrave Noelle.VoiceLineAttackCaptions: Snowgrave? I... I Dont Know That Spell...
Snowgrave Noelle.Ability1VoicelineCaptions: I... I'll do it, I promise.

Ability1.Name: PROCEED.
Ability1.Description: A voice that isn't Noelle's says the word, and a killing frost passes through every enemy in range like they were never anyone at all, dealing 1.39x current Damage. Can't be used again for 4.1s.

Ability2.Name: I Don't Know That Spell
Ability2.Description: A splinter of the spell she swears she never learned refuses to melt, seeping into every enemy standing in the frost for 2.74x current Damage total over 7.7s.

HiddenAbility.Name: The Words I've Been Waiting To Hear
HiddenAbility.Description: A voice that isn't quite Noelle's asks the question one last time, and every enemy in range freezes solid for 15 seconds, permanently slowed by 25% for the rest of the game. For the next 10 seconds, every Noelle unit on the field deals 3x damage to anything caught in the frost. There is no going back from here.

Passive.Name: The Frozen Heart
Passive.Description: Noelles Damage And Slow Amount Ramp Up Based On More Enemies In Range, With A Minimum Of 1x More Damage And 50% Slow, Up to 2.5x More Damage And 70% Slow At 15+ Enemies.

Ability1.Name: TONIGHT'S GRAND FINALE!
Ability1.Description: Tophat Tenna sweeps the hat off in a gentleman's bow, and what was hiding under it? The show-closer, delivered point-blank to one act only: the most dangerous enemy in range, for 1.8x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: A Word From Our Sponsors
Ability2.Description: Tophat Tenna picks the strongest enemy in range as tonight's one and only lucky contestant and awards them 3.04x current Damage live on air, 6% of which comes back to you as bonus cash, courtesy of the sponsors.

Passive.Name: Welcome to the Hall Of Fame!
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 0.5s Stun, Every 30s Tophat Tenna Adds A random enemy to the hall of fame, Causing Them To Take 2x More Damage For Their Entire Life Duration

Ability1.Name: [1] MISSED CALL
Ability1.Description: The phone rings exactly once, for exactly one recipient: the most dangerous enemy in range. No one has ever wanted to answer less, and the dial tone alone costs them 1.02x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: YOUR CALL IS IMPORTANT TO MIKE
Ability2.Description: Every enemy in range is placed on hold for 7.3s, elevator music and all. When MIKE finally picks up, the connection charge bills each of them 3.78x current Damage.

Passive.Name: It Pulls The Strings And Makes Them Ring
Passive.Description: All Enemies In Range Are Slowed By 60%. The Phone Rings every 10s, Dealing 3s Stun. (Voice Actor: -)

Passive.Name: Cat Got Your Tail?
Passive.Description: Attacks Stun For 0.5s, 50% Slow Is Applied If Paired With Bratty

Ability1.Name: Aromatherapy (Mandatory)
Ability1.Description: Balthizard cracks open its steel shell and lets a century of stored incense roll out in one perfumed fog bank, dealing 0.88x current Damage to every enemy in range. Can't be used again for 4s while the smoke resettles.

Passive.Name: An ancient aromancer, it generates magic incense and stores it in its steel shell.
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 100% Darkness for 1 second.

Bibilox.Ability2VoicelineCaptions: The story burns to its end.

Ability1.Name: FIREBLAL!!
Ability1.Description: Bibilox carefully spells out F-I-R-E-B-L-A-L. Close enough; the misfire still ignites every enemy in range for 1.37x current Damage. Can't be used again for 3.9s while it checks the dictionary.

Ability2.Name: SCORTCHED EARTH
Ability2.Description: For its closing chapter, Bibilox writes SCORTCHED EARTH across the ground in burning ink. The typo burns anyway, and every enemy caught in the pages takes 2.78x current Damage total over 9s.

Passive.Name: A worldly wizard that casts spells by spelling. Unfortunately prone to typos.
Passive.Description: 50% Chance For Attacks To Completely Remove Anti-Magic, Anti-Slow, Anti-Bleed, Anti-Stun, Armor, Shielded Defense And Anti-SoulLeak On Hit Enemies.

Winglade.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: Wings of steel, blades of fate.

Ability1.Name: Tailwind Cut
Ability1.Description: Winglade lays a single sword-stroke flat along the wind and holds it there; anything crossing the Tailwind Cut is shaved for 0.42x current Damage per second across 3.4s.

Ability2.Name: Steel Molt
Ability2.Description: Winglade sheds a fistful of steel feathers that whirl together into a fledgling blade, a companion that joins the lane with 1.66x its current Damage as Health and guards it for 6.2s.

Ability3.Name: OPEN YOUR EYES.
Ability3.Description: The clouds part like an eyelid, and burning plumage rains over every inch of the ground below for 10.2s at 0.95x current Damage per second.

Passive.Name: A radical blade with feathers at the hilt.
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 65% Slow For 3s, When Hitting an air enemy, Winglade deals 2x damage and turns them into a ground enemy.

Passive.Name: This guy just loves dancing so much it slows everyone around him!
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 30% Slow For 3 Seconds.

Ability1.Name: MISTAKEN FOR CARGO
Ability1.Description: Old habits: grab the biggest block, throw it in the river. Ice Wolf mistakes the most dangerous enemy in range for a lone shipment bound for the CORE and slams them downstream with 1.3x current Damage. The river never complained. Neither will they.

Passive.Name: No Longer Powering the CORE, Only Destruction.
Passive.Description: Throws Blocks Of ice At Enemies, Stunning them for 1s and applying 65% slow for 5s.

Ability1.Name: FOR WHOM DOES WICABELL TOLL? (you.)
Ability1.Description: Wicabell swings herself until the air cracks, ringing the Dolorous Dong, a curse-note tuned to one set of ears alone: the most dangerous enemy in range. It rattles around inside their head until it finds something loose, dealing 1.42x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Unpredictabell
Passive.Description: Attacks Stun For 1s

Ability1.Name: The Roaring Came Early
Ability1.Description: Titan Spawn opens eyes it shouldn't have yet, dragging one small piece of the falling sky down squarely onto the most dangerous enemy in range, dealing 1.44x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Summoned To Be A Guardian
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 50% For 3s, Deals +50% Damage If Paired With The Roaring Knight Or Titan

Passive.Name: This Dog Loves Bones!
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 50% For 3s

Passive.Name: This Dog Also Loves Bones! But Loves Destruction More!
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 100% More Damage If Paired With Any Dog Unit.

Passive.Name: You're Banned From Ham Sandwich Day!
Passive.Description: QC Earns 2750-5500 Cash Per Round, Generates 50-130 Cash Per Attack.

Ability1.Name: The Grand FinALSEI!
Ability1.Description: Firework Ralsei saves his biggest rocket for last. It whistles skyward, then dives on a single chosen mark, the most dangerous enemy in range, and pops into a spark-portrait of a smiling little prince, dealing 1.19x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Kris! Susie! Look! This fireworks the shape of my face!
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 50% Burn Over 2s

Lancer Artillery Battery.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: Kris! Shoot me into the sky!

Ability1.Name: I'M THE AMMO NOW!
Ability1.Description: Kris pulls the lanyard and Lancer becomes his own ordnance, sailing headfirst into one target only: the most dangerous enemy in range. Impact delivers 1.48x current Damage and one very proud bad guy.

Ability2.Name: AIRBORNE TIME-OUT!
Ability2.Description: A burst of spades pops every enemy in range into the sky at once, where Lancer sentences the whole crowd to a 10.1s time-out for insufficient fun. Each one comes down with a thud worth 1.32x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Kris, Susie, Ralsei And Noelle Pair Up To Shoot Lancer Out Of Their Artillery Battery!
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 2s Stun, 60% Slow For 5s And 10% SoulLeak For 5s.

Passive.Name: Happy new year 1997!
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 19.97% SoulLeak For 1.997s

Passive.Name: Pipis Nest
Passive.Description: Attacks Drop a Pipis Trap With x5 Damage.

Passive.Name: Holy Hymn Chanting
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 0.5s Stun

Ability1.Name: IT'S BED TIME.
Ability1.Description: Nightlight Tenna dims to the dead channel and croons the end-of-broadcast jingle to an audience of exactly one, the most dangerous enemy in range, dealing 0.86x current Damage. Sweet dreams. Stay tuned.

Passive.Name: Wish Upon A Star
Passive.Description: Nightlight Tenna Applies 75% Slow And 5% SoulLeak In a 90 Degree Cone.

Ability1.Name: Wet Paint, Coming Through!
Ability1.Description: One fully loaded brushstroke, dragged straight through the most dangerous enemy in range and nobody else. Ella calls it art; it deals 1.34x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: Still Life (HOLD STILL!)
Ability2.Description: Ella paints every enemy in range into one big Still Life for 10.5s. Nobody moves until the piece is finished, and once the paint dries, each takes 3.17x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Colors Of The Rainbow!
Passive.Description: Gains +35% Damage For Every Different Rarity On Your Team (Includes Herself)

Ability1.Name: COMPLIMENTARY [Table Flip]
Ability1.Description: The table goes over, the cutlery goes airborne, and every enemy in range gets the check early, worth 1.05x current Damage. Eat up, CHUMP!

Ability2.Name: TONIGHT'S SPECIAL: THE FLOOR
Ability2.Description: The burner under the battlefield stays lit for 5.2s, pan-searing everything that crosses the hot zone for 0.94x current Damage per second. The chef recommends running.

Ability3.Name: SECONDS? SECONDS!!
Ability3.Description: The dinner bell rings and the kitchen marches out another course to fight at the frontline: a fresh helper served with 1.93x its current Damage as Health, staying for 8.1s. Absolutely no DOGGY BAG.

Passive.Name: KRIS! ITS GETTING TOO [400 Degrees Fahrenheit] IN HERE!
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 100% Burn Over 3 Seconds.

Ability1.Name: Hide-A-Bed, Hide-A-Body
Ability1.Description: Couch unfolds invitingly beneath the most dangerous enemy in range, then folds back up with that one unlucky guest still inside, dealing 1.19x current Damage. So comfy. So final.

Passive.Name: Sleep To Skip Time?
Passive.Description: All Units In Range Get a 20% (40% Shiny) Cooldown Reduction

Ability1.Name: unused_slash.anim
Ability1.Description: Tao swings a sword the game never finished loading. For one corrupted frame, one entity is deleted from the scene; the most dangerous enemy in range simply isn't there anymore, taking 1.53x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Debug Asset
Passive.Description: Attacks Glitch Out enemies Causing Them To Take 0.1s Stun

Ability1.Name: ALL HEARTS ON DECK!
Ability1.Description: In the Princess's name, Cupitain orders a full broadside: a volley of heart-tipped arrows that leaves every enemy in range Lovestruck, dealing 1.25x current Damage. Can't be used again for 4.1s.

Passive.Name: Glory To Our Princess!
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 40% Slow And 5% SoulLeak For 3s

Ability1.Name: I Was The Original Meteor
Ability1.Description: Falling exactly the way the original would have fallen, Starwalker Bird drops out of orbit beak-first through the most dangerous enemy in range, one bird, one impact, dealing 1.3x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Not The Original Starwalker
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow Enemies By 65% For 3s

Passive.Name: LVL 3
Passive.Description: Gains +0.25% Damage For Every Kill, At A Max Of 25%

Passive.Name: Trapped In An Endless Pain
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 100% Darkness Over 1 Second

Passive.Name: Zzz
Passive.Description: If an enemy is in HERO_AXE's Range For More Than 10s, They Get 70% Slow.

Ability1.Name: BIG SHOT BIG SHOT BIG SHOT
Ability1.Description: GIGA Spamton screams BIG SHOT until it becomes true, hosing every enemy caught in the blast with showman firepower for 3.3s at 0.53x current Damage per second.

Ability2.Name: SPONSORED CONTENT
Ability2.Description: The ground beneath GIGA Spamton fills with unskippable burning pop-ups for 6.6s, dealing 0.74x current Damage per second to everything standing in them. Clicking the X does not close them. Nothing closes them.

Ability3.Name: NO REFUNDS*
Ability3.Description: GIGA Spamton invoices one [Valued Customer], the strongest enemy in range, for 1.68x current Damage, payment due immediately. *6% of it comes back to you as Kromer. Don't ask where he keeps it.

Passive.Name: THIS [Big Shot Suit] IS EQUIPPED WITH OVER-THE-TOP [InternalHeating]!
Passive.Description: Attacks Execute Enemies Under 10% Health (5% Bosses/Mini-Bosses) And Apply 25% Burn For 1s. GIGA Spamton opens His CORE every 30s, Completely Executing Enemies Hit If Under 30% Health, If Not Then He Deals x30 Damage.

Passive.Name: A True Flashy Salesman! Not a trashy Bigshot.
Passive.Description: All units in range are given a 20% (40% Shiny) Damage Boost.

Ability1.Name: NO KROMER DOWN!!
Ability1.Description: Bigshot rolls a [Certified Pre-Owned] SPECIL off the lot to fight on your side, delivered with 1.47x current Damage as Health, and it rams the frontline for 4.4s, at which point the free trial expires.

Ability2.Name: EXTENDED WARRANTY [Void Where Prohibited]
Ability2.Description: Every enemy in range is enrolled at once in a [Once In A Lifetime] extended warranty: 8.6s frozen stiff in the fine print, then 1.81x current Damage to each when coverage lapses.

Passive.Name: Welcome To Spamtons BIGSHOT Auto Repairs! BUY NOW BUY NOW!!
Passive.Description: Summons a Bigshot Car Every 30s With x25 Health Of His Current Damage.

Passive.Name: Do you remember this kids name? Seriously i can't remember!
Passive.Description: Gains 4200->8400 Cash Per Wave.

Chara.VoiceLineSellCaptions: You think you’re safe without me?

Ability1.Name: Stab. Slash. Repeat.
Ability1.Description: The hand is gone but the knife-work stays. A red afterimage keeps carving the ground beneath it for 5s, dealing 0.4x current Damage per second to everything caught inside the pattern. It has excellent follow-through.

Ability2.Name: The Real Knife
Ability2.Description: About time. One line, carved wall to wall through everything caught in its path for 5.6s, dealing 0.58x current Damage per second. Where it points, nothing gets to continue.

Ability3.Name: Won 99999 EXP And GOLD.
Ability3.Description: Chara singles out the strongest enemy in range and takes it apart with practiced, unhurried precision, dealing 1.77x current Damage; what drops gets pocketed, refunding 9% of that as bonus cash. You thought you were safe without them?

Passive.Name: Genocide
Passive.Description: Every 9th Attack Deals 999% More Damage And Applies 5s Darkened Stun

Ability1.Name: RUN. INTO. THE. VINES!!!
Ability1.Description: Golly, you're doing great! Flowey's vines tangle around every enemy in range and hold them nice and still for 3.7s so nobody misses a single dose of friendship, dealing 0.58x current Damage per second.

Ability2.Name: KILL OR BE KILLED
Ability2.Description: In this world, it's KILL or BE killed. The friendly grin every enemy in range trusted splits open all at once, dealing 2.16x current Damage. Can't be used again for 10.4s.

Passive.Name: Your Best Friend
Passive.Description: Attacks Chain Up To 5 Different Enemies. Every 25s Flowey Uses His Vines and grabs a random enemy, dealing 3x damage and stunning them for 5 seconds.

Ability1.Name: shortcut.
Ability1.Description: sans doesn't get up. one bone just knows a shortcut, and it goes straight through the single most dangerous enemy in range for 1.55x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: you feel your sins crawling on your back.
Ability2.Description: a cage of bones settles around every enemy in range for 8.1s. sans recommends standing very, very still. the first inch anyone moves costs them 3.54x current Damage.

Passive.Name: You're gonna have a bad time.
Passive.Description: Every 30s Sans Spawns a Gaster Blaster dealing 4x Pierce Damage To The Nearest Enemy Every 0.25s For 3s. Attacks Apply 150% Darkness For 1 Second.

Passive.Name: Bonetrousle
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 50% For 2 Seconds.

Ability1.Name: STAY RIGHT THERE, PUNK!
Ability1.Description: Undyne rams a single spear through the whole lane and leans on it; every enemy skewered along the shaft takes 0.31x current Damage per second for 4.8s.

Ability2.Name: NGAHHH!! REINFORCEMENTS!!
Ability2.Description: One shout brings the Royal Guard sprinting to their captain's side. A guard with 1.4x her current Damage as Health charges in and throws itself at the frontline for 5.8s.

Ability3.Name: The Heroine Melts
Ability3.Description: She is coming apart, and she refuses to notice. Where the Undying drips, the ground beneath every enemy in range boils with raw determination for 8.1s, dealing 0.81x current Damage per second.

Passive.Name: Battle Against A True Hero
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 65% Slow for 3s, Every 10s Undyne Spawns a Barrage Of Spears that Deals 5x Damage to the Nearest Group Of enemies. (Max 10 Enemies/Bosses Hit)

Ability1.Name: W-Wait, That's Not The Right Button!
Ability1.Description: Alphys trips over her own keyboard and vents an experimental surge straight out of the True Lab into every enemy in range, dealing 1.02x current Damage. Can't be used again for 3.4s; she has to finish apologizing first.

Passive.Name: Royal Scientist
Passive.Description: Alphys Spawns 4 Mettaton Turrets That Deal 0.5x Her Current Damage every 0.5s in single target.

Ability1.Name: WRONG! WRONG! WRONG!
Ability1.Description: Mettaton wheels out tonight's Quiz Segment. Every enemy in range is now a contestant, every answer is WRONG, and every wrong answer costs 1x current Damage. Can't be used again for 3.7s while the show cuts to commercial.

Passive.Name: Oh My...
Passive.Description: Mettaton Deals 200% More Damage To Enemies That Are Actively Being Burned, Or Have Darkness Applied To Them.

Asgore Dreemurr.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: For the kingdom… I must fight.
Asgore Dreemurr.Ability2VoicelineCaptions: Even kings must take their due.

Ability1.Name: Blue, Orange, Through.
Ability1.Description: The trident flickers blue, then orange, then simply goes through; the single most dangerous enemy in range takes 1.07x current Damage either way.

Ability2.Name: There Is No MERCY Here
Ability2.Description: Asgore brings his trident down on the one strongest enemy in range the way he once brought it down on a MERCY button, dealing 2.3x current Damage; the kingdom's coffers quietly reclaim 10% of it as bonus cash.

Passive.Name: Bergentrückung
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 35% SoulLeak for 3 seconds. Every 3rd Attack Deals 300% More Damage And Applies 2s Darkened Stun

Asriel Dreemurr.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: I will show you my true power.
Asriel Dreemurr.VoiceLineAttackCaptions: Feel the light of the end!
Asriel Dreemurr.Ability1VoicelineCaptions: I will show you my true power.
Asriel Dreemurr.Ability2VoicelineCaptions: Feel the light of the end.

Ability1.Name: Star Blazing
Ability1.Description: One falling star answers Asriel's call and comes down on the single most dangerous enemy in range for 0.86x current Damage. He's showing you his true power a little at a time.

Ability2.Name: One More SOUL
Ability2.Description: Asriel reaches out and takes hold of the strongest enemy in range the way he once reached for six human SOULs, dealing 1.32x current Damage and refunding 10% of that as bonus cash. Old habits.

Ability3.Name: Feel The Light Of The End
Ability3.Description: The horizon goes white. Every enemy in range stands in the final dawn and takes 2.36x current Damage, and somewhere inside the glow a small voice is saying goodbye.

Passive.Name: Hopes And Dreams
Passive.Description: Every 60s Asriel Dreemurr Charges Up Hyper Goner For 5s, Dealing 5x His Current Damage Every 0.25s As Pierce Spread for 7s. Asriel Dreemurr Cannot Attack While Charging Or Using Hyper Goner

God Of Hyperdeath.VoiceLineAttackCaptions: Your life ends here, in a world where no one remembers you!

Ability1.Name: Chaos Saber
Ability1.Description: Twin blades of rainbow light scissor shut over the single most dangerous enemy in range, dealing 1.25x current Damage. Behold: that was the warm-up swing.

Ability2.Name: Everyone's Hearts, Beating As One
Ability2.Description: He can feel it. For 6.9s, every tower in range falls into rhythm with the God Of Hyperdeath's pulse, gaining +13% Damage and +8% Cooldown Reduction. He is NOT losing this one.

Ability3.Name: SIX LITTLE COFFINS
Ability3.Description: Every enemy in range is shut inside a coffin of borrowed SOUL-light for 8.9s, sealed in a world where no one remembers them. When the lids finally creak open, each takes 2.2x current Damage.

Passive.Name: SAVE the WORLD!
Passive.Description: All SAVED Monster Units In Range Get +1 Placements! Attacks Stun For 1s And Apply 75% Slow For 3s.

Passive.Name: Heartache
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 150% Burn Damage Over 1 Second. Deals x2 More Damage To Enemies That Are Actively Being Burned.

Passive.Name: Can You Really Call This A Hotel, I Didn't Receive A Mint On My Pillow Or Anything
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 25% For 2 Seconds

Passive.Name: College Fund
Passive.Description: Gains 750->1500 Cash Every 10 Seconds.

Ability1.Name: LIGHTS! CAMERA! LEG!
Ability1.Description: Mettaton EX strikes his patented pose and delivers one chrome high-kick to the single most dangerous enemy in range, dealing 0.92x current Damage. Darling, the ratings have never been higher.

Passive.Name: Death By Glamour
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 100% Anti Regen for 3s, Mettaton EX Dances Every 35s Dealing A 5x AOE Attack Of His Current Damage

Ability1.Name: DRAMA! ROMANCE! BLOODSHED!
Ability1.Description: The cameras zoom in as Mettaton NEO casts the one most dangerous enemy in range as tonight's disposable co-star. Their exit scene airs at 1.34x current Damage. What a performance, darling.

Ability2.Name: DRAMATIC PAUSE
Ability2.Description: Mettaton NEO calls for a DRAMATIC PAUSE. Every enemy in range is stuck mid-pose under the spotlight for 9.5s, until the arm-cannon punchline lands on each of them for 1.36x current Damage.

Passive.Name: The Lights Are Blaring
Passive.Description: Decreases Your First Slots Placements by -1 But Gains +85% Damage, -10% Cooldown And +100% Range

Photoshop Flowey.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: LET’S SEE HOW YOU HANDLE THIS!

Ability1.Name: SAVE FILE CORRUPTED
Ability1.Description: Photoshop Flowey overwrites the single most dangerous enemy in range like a bad save file, pixels smeared and data screaming, dealing 1.39x current Damage. You can't LOAD your way out of this one.

Ability2.Name: SIX SOULS BUFFERING
Ability2.Description: The screen tears. For 8s, writhing vines duplicate frame by stuttering frame around every enemy in range, and when the render finally catches up, each of them takes 3.38x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Your Best Nightmare
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 65% For 5s, Every 45s Photoshop Flowey Drops An AOE Bomb That Deals 10x Damage And 10s Of Stun To All Enemies In Range.

Passive.Name: Amalgamation
Passive.Description: The Amalgamations Gain 0.5% Damage For Every Enemy Killed (Max 50%) and 0.5% For Every 1 Base HP Lost.

Passive.Name: Amalgamation
Passive.Description: The Amalgamations Gain 0.5% Damage For Every Enemy Killed (Max 50%) and 0.5% For Every 1 Base HP Lost.

Passive.Name: Amalgamation
Passive.Description: The Amalgamations Gain 0.5% Damage For Every Enemy Killed (Max 50%) and 0.5% For Every 1 Base HP Lost.

Passive.Name: Amalgamation
Passive.Description: The Amalgamations Gain 0.5% Damage For Every Enemy Killed (Max 50%) and 0.5% For Every 1 Base HP Lost.

Passive.Name: Day And Night
Passive.Description: Attacks Hit Twice If Paired With Madjick

Passive.Name: Mercenaries emerge from the shadows.
Passive.Description: Attacks Hit Twice If Paired With Knight Knight

Passive.Name: Blindness
Passive.Description: Attacks Stun enemies For 0.5s

Passive.Name: Flys
Passive.Description: Every 3rd Attack Deals x2 More Damage

Passive.Name: No Longer Scared
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 2x Damage To enemies 15 Range Or Closer

Muffet.Ability1VoicelineCaptions: Caught in my web now, dearie~
Muffet.Ability2VoicelineCaptions: Rotting slow, just like I planned~

Ability1.Name: The Floor Was Always A Web~
Ability1.Description: Ahuhuhu~ did they think that was carpet? The parlor floor snaps shut and every enemy in range gets bundled up as fresh stock for the bake sale, taking 1.59x current Damage. Can't be used again for 4.1s.

Ability2.Name: House Blend, 9,999G A Cup
Ability2.Description: Muffet tips over a kettle of Spider Cider, made with real spiders of course, and it pools beneath every enemy in range. Anyone who tracks through it owes 2.16x current Damage total over 9s, and all sales are final~

Passive.Name: Giant Muffin
Passive.Description: Every 15s Muffet Summons Her Pet Muffin, Killing a random enemy in her range and stunning all other enemies in range for 1s.

Ability1.Name: DOUBLE DUTCH INFERNO
Ability1.Description: Pyrope whips its own blazing tail overhead like a jump rope and snaps it down in one searing lash on the most dangerous enemy in range, dealing 1.23x current Damage. Hot? HOTTER!!

Passive.Name: Flaming Hot
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 200% Burn Over 3 Seconds.

Passive.Name: Volcanic Eruption
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 100% Burn Damage Over 3 Seconds.

Ability1.Name: TH-THAT COLLISION COURSE WAS A COINCIDENCE!
Ability1.Description: Tsunderplane swears it wasn't even looking at the most dangerous enemy in range. That one crash landing, on that one enemy alone, just sort of happened, dealing 1.15x current Damage. And if it hurt, that's THEIR fault.

Passive.Name: Bombs Away!
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 250% Burn Damage Over 1s. Enemies Hit Are Darkened Stunned For 3s

Passive.Name: Foolish. Foolish! FOOLISH!
Passive.Description: Summons Two Dummy Bots That Deal 2000->4000 Every 0.5s In Splash.

Passive.Name: Unnecessary Tension
Passive.Description: Enemies In Range Are Slowed By 35% For 5s. Boosts All Towers In Range For A 30% Range Boost (60% If Shiny)

Passive.Name: Song For You
Passive.Description: All Towers In Range Are Given a 22% Cooldown Reduction (40% If Shiny)

Passive.Name: Squeaky Clean
Passive.Description: Applys 50% AOE Anti Regen Every 2s For 5s. All Units In Range Are Given A +25% Damage Boost (50% Shiny)

Ability1.Name: MEW MEW KISSY CALAMITY
Ability1.Description: Halfway through her magical-girl transformation pose, something in the doll misfires. Mad Mew Mew comes out of the sparkles all claws, raking every enemy in range at once for 1.23x current Damage. Can't be used again for 5s while she snaps her two halves back together.

Passive.Name: Ticklish
Passive.Description: Increases Your 5th Units Placement by +1. Attacks Apply 0.5s Stun

Passive.Name: Dogsong
Passive.Description: The Closer An Enemy Is, The More Damage Greater Dog Does To It (1% For Every 1 Range, Max 50% Per Enemy). Gains +1% Damage For Every 2 Enemies Killed. (Max 50%)

Ability1.Name: FEAST YOUR EYES!
Ability1.Description: Feast your eyes! Glyde corkscrews out of the sky in a dive absolutely nobody requested, tearing the ground open beneath every enemy in range at once for 1.51x current Damage. Can't be used again for 3s; an entrance this cool demands a pause for applause.

Passive.Name: Mysterious Creature
Passive.Description: Deals 3x Damage To Enemies That Are Slowed Or Stunned.

Passive.Name: Everyone Knows Jerry
Passive.Description: Jerry Does Nothing Useful, But He Is Known By All.

Ability1.Name: Nuzzle Champs '98
Ability1.Description: One nose-nuzzle for luck, then both wedding axes come down as one on the single most dangerous enemy in range, carving them for 1.57x current Damage. Such is dog marriage.

Passive.Name: Love Wins
Passive.Description: Attacks Hit Twice And Deal 0.5s Stun.

Passive.Name: Not As Great, but still a dog.
Passive.Description: Deals 50% More Damage If Paired With any other dog units.

Passive.Name: Not A Chill Guy
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 10% SoulLeak And 20% Anti Regen For 2 Seconds

Passive.Name: Do You Like My Hat?
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 50% For 4 Seconds.

Passive.Name: Stare
Passive.Description: The Longer An Enemy Is Stared At The More Damage It Takes (1% A Second. Max 100%).

Passive.Name: Spirit
Passive.Description: Dummy Deals 250% More Damage If Paired With Mad Mew Mew, Ralsei's Dummy Or Mad Dummy.

Passive.Name: Frogs
Passive.Description: Every 10s Froggit Will Spawn A Mini Froggit That Deals x2 Damage To The Nearest Enemy.

Passive.Name: Scared Of You
Passive.Description: Whimsun Deals 50% More Damage When Enemies Are 10% Or Less Health.

Passive.Name: Alone Time
Passive.Description: Migosp Deals x2 More Damage When Alone.

Passive.Name: Share An Umbrella?
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 80% Slow For 1 Second.

Passive.Name: Everyone Loves Nice Cream!
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 60% Slow For 2 Seconds.

So Sorry!.Ability2VoicelineCaptions: So sorry, I called for help.

Ability1.Name: Oops! Oops!! OOPS!!!
Ability1.Description: So Sorry! backs up apologizing, trips over his own tail, and the whole flailing mess comes crashing down on every enemy in range at once for 1.25x current Damage. He is so, so sorry about this.

Ability2.Name: It Came Out Wrong (It Bites)
Ability2.Description: So Sorry! sketches a helper in a panic, apologizes to the drawing, and sets it loose on the frontline anyway; it fights for 7.1s with 1.62x his current Damage as Health.

Ability3.Name: Um... You've Got This! (Sorry!)
Ability3.Description: So Sorry! doodles flattering little portraits of every tower in range (mostly on-model), and for 7.2s they all fight like the art: +25% Damage and +16% Cooldown Reduction.

Passive.Name: Wrong Enemy !?
Passive.Description: Spawns Two Drawing Turrets That Deal The Units Current Damage In Single Target Every 0.5 Seconds. Every 25s Draws a Random Picture Of An Enemy, summoning them to the field at a random exit with x15 of their damage becoming the summoned units health.

Ability1.Name: NGAHHH!!!
Ability1.Description: Undyne winds up, screams loud enough to crack the pavement, and puts a single spear of pure determination clean through the most dangerous enemy in range, dealing 1.8x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: As Long As You're GREEN, You CAN'T ESCAPE!
Ability2.Description: Undyne fences every enemy in range inside one great cage of spears for 7.1s, and when the cage snaps shut, each prisoner takes 3.43x current Damage. Honor demands they stay and fight.

Passive.Name: The Spear Of Justice
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 100% Anti-Regen For 5s, Deals 2x Damage And 1s Stun if Paired With Hammer of Justice.

Passive.Name: Candy Canes
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 50% Slow To Enemies, Deals 2x Damage If Paired With Any Christmas Units.

Ability1.Name: You've Made The Naughty List!
Ability1.Description: Santa Ralsei checks his list twice, finds the most dangerous enemy in range on the wrong side of it, and politely delivers one gift-wrapped hex to their doorstep worth 1.25x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: Please Stay Cozy!
Ability2.Description: Santa Ralsei tucks every enemy in range beneath one wide quilt of enchanted snow for 8.2s. When the Thaw arrives, each of them wakes up to 2.52x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Festive Cake Bombs
Passive.Description: Every 15s Santa Ralsei Will Throw A Festive Cake Bomb That Deals 5x Its Damage In Nuke With 200% Burn Over 1 Second.

Passive.Name: Festive Supplies
Passive.Description: Attacks Stun enemies For 0.5s By Wrapping Them In Gift Boxes.

Passive.Name: Krismas Tree... Get It! Kris Mas! - From Noelle
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 75% Anti-Regen For 1s.

Ability1.Name: GET BENT, WHOVILLE
Ability1.Description: Grinch Susie corners the most dangerous enemy in range and shakes them down for their stockings, their roast beast, and the last crumb of cheer too small for a mouse, dealing 1.57x current Damage. Then she eats the crumb. She's still Susie.

Passive.Name: Here to Ruin Your Christmas!
Passive.Description: Steals 25% Of The Currently Targeted Enemy's Health Every 3s

Passive.Name: HoHoHo! Im Even Uglier Than Before!
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 40% For 3s

Noelles Sleigh.Ability2VoicelineCaptions: Ashes where the snow once was.

Ability1.Name: Incoming Cheer!! (Sorry!!)
Ability1.Description: The sleigh takes the corner way too fast and a whole December's worth of presents flies off the back, pelting every enemy in range at once for 1.02x current Damage. Can't be used again for 3.2s.

Ability2.Name: The Coal Clause
Ability2.Description: A trail of scorched ribbon and smoldering wrapping paper marks wherever the sleigh has been. Every enemy who follows it burns for 2.22x current Damage total over 7.7s. Consider it re-gifted.

HiddenAbility.Name: The Words I've Been Waiting To Hear
HiddenAbility.Description: A voice that isn't quite Noelle's asks the question one last time, and every enemy in range freezes solid for 13 seconds, permanently slowed by 25% for the rest of the game. For the next 9 seconds, every Noelle unit on the field deals 2.75x damage to anything caught in the frost. There is no going back from here.

Passive.Name: Christmas In Home Town
Passive.Description: Noelle Throws Presents Out Of Her Sleigh Every 15s Dealing x10 Splash Damage And 1s Stun.

Christmas Misfits.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: You Wont Stop Us! Right Noelle?

Ability1.Name: IceShock! (Susie Dared Her)
Ability1.Description: Noelle squeaks out a single IceShock at the most dangerous enemy in range while Susie yells encouragement from underneath her, dealing 1.27x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: Gift-Wrapped (DO NOT OPEN)
Ability2.Description: The Misfits wind every enemy in range up in ribbon, tinsel, and about forty feet of lights, leaving them all Gift-Wrapped for 8.5s. When the bow finally snaps, each takes 1.51x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Can We Stand Under The MistleToe Instead?
Passive.Description: Susie Carries Noelle On Her Shoulder, Allowing Noelle To Mimic Susies Damage In Splash Every 2s

Ability1.Name: Attention Shoppers, It Is I, Santa
Ability1.Description: Mall Santa Queen Declares A Storewide Giveaway And Tips The Entire Seasonal Display Onto Every Enemy In Range At Once, dealing 1.36x current Damage. Can't be used again for 3.6s. Happy Holidays To Whoever Is Having One. Lol.

Passive.Name: Im Totally Santa! See Look At My Huge Bag!
Passive.Description: Mall Santa Queen Hurls Coal From Her Present, Dealing 5x Damage And 3s Stun Every 20s.

Passive.Name: Delivering Presents & Flowers, While Eating Cookies And Drinking Milk.
Passive.Description: Santa Asgore Has A 50/50 Chance To Either Apply 10% SoulLeak Or 100% Darkness Every Other Attack.

Passive.Name: Would You Like a Christmas Flavored Pie? Straight To The Face?
Passive.Description: Mrs. Claus Toriel Hurls A Christmas Pie At Her Enemies Every 30s, Dealing 2x Damage And 50% Burn For 2s.

Passive.Name: Festive Buster
Passive.Description: Every 3rd Attack Santa Susie Uses Festive Buster Dealing 3x Damage.

Holiday Tenna.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: WELCOME, EVERYBODY!! THE HOLIDAY SPECIAL HAS BEGUN!!
Holiday Tenna.VoiceLineAttackCaptions: FREE GIFTS FOR ALL OUR LOVELY VIEWERS!!
Holiday Tenna.VoiceLineSellCaptions: WE'LL BE BACK AFTER THESE MESSAGES!!

Ability1.Name: IT'S TV TIME!!
Ability1.Description: THE CAMERAS ARE LIVE, FOLKS!! Holiday Tenna showers tonight's entire studio audience, every enemy in range, with pyrotechnic applause worth 1.21x current Damage. The confetti cannons need to recharge. Can't be used again for 5.1s.

Ability2.Name: YOU'VE BEEN GIFT-WRAPPED!!
Ability2.Description: FREE GIFTS FOR EVERYBODY!! Every enemy in range becomes Gift-Wrapped, mummified in tangled string lights for 5.9s, and when the ribbons come off on live television, each one takes 1.78x current Damage.

Ability3.Name: THE 24-HOUR YULE LOG MARATHON
Ability3.Description: Tenna torches the whole set for his coziest segment of the season; every enemy basking in the crackling broadcast takes 2.22x current Damage total over 9.2s. RATINGS HAVE NEVER BEEN WARMER, VIEWERS!!

Passive.Name: Holiday Spectacular
Passive.Description: Every 40 seconds, Holiday Tenna begins a Holiday Broadcast for 10 seconds. During the broadcast, enemies hit by Holiday Tenna become Festive, causing them to receive +40% damage from all sources and slowing them by 20%. While Holiday Broadcast is active, Holiday Tenna attacks 50% faster and every fifth attack drops an Explosive Present that deals 8x current Damage in a large Splash area and stuns enemies for 1 second. If an enemy is defeated while Festive, Holiday Tenna permanently gains +1% Damage (Maximum 100 stacks).

Ability1.Name: IT'S [Pipis] SEASON
Ability1.Description: The egg is wrapped. The egg is given. For 4.9s, every tower in range receives the gift of Pipis and understands, gaining +9% Damage and +5% Cooldown Reduction.

Ability2.Name: THE EGG RISES
Ability2.Description: A Pipis ascends and blots out the sun. Every enemy in range stands Egg-Struck beneath it for 7.6s, unable to look away, and each takes 0.99x current Damage the moment the shadow passes.

Ability3.Name: SPECIAL DELIVERY (DO NOT SHAKE)
Ability3.Description: Something red-wrapped under the tree hatches ahead of schedule. A crimson-cloaked helper crawls onto the field to hold the line, arriving with 1.74x Festive Pipis's current Damage as Health and fighting for 9s.

Passive.Name: Pipis Says Nothing, But Pipis Means Everything
Passive.Description: All Units In Range Get a 10% (20% Shiny) Cooldown Reduction, 15% (30% Shiny) Range Increase, And 15% (30% Shiny) Damage Increase.

Togore Dreemurr.Ability1VoicelineCaptions: Feel the weight of my strike.

Ability1.Name: SQUEAK.
Ability1.Description: Togore Dreemurr toddles up to the most dangerous enemy in range and delivers one solemn, squeaking headbutt of fatherly love, dealing 1.27x current Damage. Togoretastic.

Ability2.Name: BUTTONS DON'T BLINK
Ability2.Description: Togore fixes every enemy in range with his button eyes for 8s. Buttons never blink. Everyone else does, and blinking costs each of them 3.44x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Togore Tastic
Passive.Description: Togore Mimics The Nearest Units Damage Every 5s, Dealing It On His Next Attack Alongside His Own.

Ability1.Name: OCCURS OFTEN.
Ability1.Description: One crack opens where the most dangerous enemy in range used to make sense, dealing 1.48x current Damage to it alone. DIMENSION SHATTERING OCCURS OFTEN. IT WILL OCCUR AGAIN.

Ability2.Name: THE STRINGS REMEMBER
Ability2.Description: HIM's strings sink into the floor and keep pulling for 7.8s. Every enemy that walks the rotted patch is worked like a puppet against its own bones, taking 0.44x current Damage per second.

Ability3.Name: SUBJECT GROUP: ALL OF THEM
Ability3.Description: Every enemy caught in the static is enrolled. For 9.9s it takes their measurements at 0.9x current Damage per second. Consent was not part of the procedure. THIS EXPERIMENT MUST CONTINUE.

Passive.Name: It's HIM
Passive.Description: Every 15s HIM Takes Control Of One Of Your Random Units, Tripling Their Damage And Attack Speed For 3s. Attacks Also Have A 10% Chance To Shatter Reality, Dealing 10x Damage And 5s Stun

???.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: So we finally meet, after all this time.
???.VoiceLineAttackCaptions: NO ONE can choose who they are in this world!
???.VoiceLineSellCaptions: It appears we are approaching an end.

Ability1.Name: A Knife To Cut The Sky
Ability1.Description: ??? draws a blade cut from fountain-darkness and turns it on the most dangerous enemy in range, one cut for 1.82x current Damage. No one can choose who they are in this world. That includes surviving this.

Ability2.Name: THE ROARING, LET IN AN INCH
Ability2.Description: The sky splits along a seam only ??? can see, and a sliver of the Roaring pours through onto all enemies in range at once, dealing 2.46x current Damage. Heaven takes a moment to seal itself shut. Can't be used again for 4.9s.

Ability3.Name: So We Finally Meet.
Ability3.Description: ??? greets the strongest enemy in range like an appointment kept after all this time, dealing 3.58x current Damage to that one alone, and the Angel's Heaven pays out a tithe, refunding 8% of it as bonus cash.

Passive.Name: The True Angel
Passive.Description: ??? cannot gain additional placements or receive booster effects. Instead, for every allied unit within range, ??? gains +15% Damage, +7.5% Range, and -2.5% Cooldown. (Maximum 8 units)

Ability1.Name: ...bleh.
Ability1.Description: Vampire Kris says nothing, tilts their head, and sinks both fangs into the most dangerous enemy in range for 1.23x current Damage. They don't even blink.

Ability2.Name: The Quiet Feeding
Ability2.Description: Every enemy in range goes on Kris's menu at once, their strength ebbing drop by drop for 9.5s; once the last drop is drunk, each of them suffers 1.5x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Fangs
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 100% Bleed Damage Over 4s

Ability1.Name: TRICK.
Ability1.Description: The Guardian's candle winks out, and something older than Halloween grins in the dark at the most dangerous enemy in range, dealing it 1.73x current Damage. Just it. Just this once.

Ability2.Name: TREAT. (For Me.)
Ability2.Description: The Guardian hoists the strongest enemy in range upside-down and shakes until the candy falls out, dealing 3.12x current Damage and tipping 12% of it back to you as bonus cash.

Passive.Name: THE GUARDIAN OF THE CANDY
Passive.Description: Attacks apply 100% Darkness And Stun For 1 Second. Enemies Currently Affected By Darkness Take 3x Damage From The Pumpkin Guardian.

Ability1.Name: BOLT-NECK SPECIAL
Ability1.Description: Frankenstein Susie yanks the lightning straight off the bolts in her neck and stitches it into one monster haymaker, frying the most dangerous enemy in range for 1.05x current Damage. Get bent.

Passive.Name: Back From The Dead!
Passive.Description: Attacks Chain Up To 3 Nearby Enemies. If an attack kills an enemy, it has a 10% chance to fully heal the enemy, and have the enemy fight for you until it is killed.

Passive.Name: I Made Candy Corn Cake!! Who Wants Some??
Passive.Description: When this unit is placed, it creates a candy corn cake that heals your base for 1 health for every 5 enemies killed in its range (50 range)

HiddenAbility.Name: The Words I've Been Waiting To Hear
HiddenAbility.Description: A voice that isn't quite Noelle's asks the question one last time, and every enemy in range freezes solid for 10 seconds, permanently slowed by 25% for the rest of the game. For the next 7 seconds, every Noelle unit on the field deals 2x damage to anything caught in the frost. There is no going back from here.

Passive.Name: THE ANGEL...?
Passive.Description: Attacks Gain 10% Darkness For Every Enemy In Range, Up To 100%. At 100% Darkness, Angel Noelle's Next Attack Deals 5x Damage And Stuns Enemies For 3s. (Once every 60 seconds)

Passive.Name: Mechanical Genius!
Passive.Description: The Longer Cyborg Berdly Attacks An Enemy, The More Damage Cyborg Berdly Deals, Gaining 5% More Damage Every Second, Up To 500%.

Passive.Name: Terrible Tasting Treats
Passive.Description: All Enemies In Range Are Given A Piece Of Candy Corn, Reducing Their Health By 5% And Speed By 2.5% For Every Piece, Stacking Up To 5 Pieces, Each Piece Lasts For 3s.

Ability1.Name: SHE'S RIGHT BEHIND YOU
Ability1.Description: The most dangerous enemy in range hears slow breathing under a plastic mask, and by then it's already over. The kitchen knife slides in, one clean stroke for 1.25x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: NO MORE SLOW WALKING
Ability2.Description: Dess breaks the one rule every slasher keeps: she stops walking. Every enemy in range gets carved up before the scream finishes, taking 1.84x current Damage. Can't be used again for 7s.

Passive.Name: Campfire Story
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 100% Bleed For 5s, And Causes Enemies To Permanently Recieve 25% More Damage From Halloween Units.

Ability1.Name: PLEASE [Hire Me]
Ability1.Description: Job Application Spamton hands his resume to every tower in range. REFERENCES: NONE. AVAILABILITY: FOREVER. For 3.6s they all work harder out of sheer pity, gaining +8% Damage and +5% Cooldown Reduction.

Ability2.Name: BURNING [Bridges]
Ability2.Description: He sets his last stack of cover letters alight beneath him: 7.8s of smoldering paperwork dealing 0.67x current Damage per second to every enemy that steps on his career.

Ability3.Name: THE INTERVIEW NEVER ENDS
Ability3.Description: Everything he never got to sell comes out at once: a 9.7s pitch delivered point-blank through every enemy caught in it, at 1.13x current Damage per second. He will not be taking questions.

Passive.Name: [KRIS!] AM I [scary] OR WHAT!?!
Passive.Description: Nearby units enjoy 10% (20% Shiny) faster Cooldowns, 15% (30% Shiny) more Range, and 15% (30% Shiny) more Damage.

Ability1.Name: A GIFT!! FROM YOUR FRAIND!!
Ability1.Description: Princess Jackenstein wrenches the lightning right out of her own neck-bolts and gives it (GIVES IT!!) to the most dangerous enemy in range, dealing 1.46x current Damage. She is pretty sure this is how friendship works.

Passive.Name: FRAINDS!! DO YOU LAIKE MY PRINCESS DRESS!!?
Passive.Description: All Units In Range Get A 25% (50% Shiny) Damage Boost.

Ability1.Name: THE LEDGER SAYS TODAY
Ability1.Description: Grim Reaper Knight consults his ledger, finds the most dangerous enemy in range penciled in for later, and moves the appointment up: one scythe stroke for 1.28x current Damage. No rescheduling.

Passive.Name: Reaper's Curse
Passive.Description: Gains 1% More Damage Per Every Enemy Killed By Grim Reaper Knight, Stacking Up To 500%

Passive.Name: Gyaa! Ha! Ha! I Solved The Case!
Passive.Description: Attacks Remove All Modifiers On enemies.

Passive.Name: Witch's Curse!
Passive.Description: All Enemies In Range Take 25% More Damage.

Passive.Name: Bone Shattering Strike
Passive.Description: Attacks Hit Twice If There Are Other Halloween Units In Range.

Ability1.Name: Mandatory Morale (Effective Immediately)
Ability1.Description: The Duchess circulates a memo no tower dares leave unread: for 4.5s, every tower in range performs at +7% Damage and +4% Cooldown Reduction. Meow. That will be all.

Ability2.Name: Filed Under: PEST CONTROL
Ability2.Description: Every enemy in range is Detained pending review for 6.8s, bound in whip-wire and red tape. When their paperwork finally clears, each is stamped with 2.13x current Damage. Case closed.

Ability3.Name: Emergency Staff Meeting
Ability3.Description: One sharp whistle and a tasquette clocks in on the frontline, summoned with 6.24x its current Damage as Health to fight for 7.2s. Overtime pay is, regrettably, not included.

Passive.Name: Posthumous Employment
Passive.Description: Every 15 seconds, Tasque Duchess enters Overtime for 5 seconds. Enemies damaged by Tasque Duchess during this time that die become Reassigned as allied Revenants. Revenants inherit the defeated enemy's maximum Health plus 3x Tasque Duchess's current Damage, retracing their path toward its entrance while damaging enemies they collide with. Revenants despawn after 60 seconds, upon reaching the entrance, or when defeated. Maximum 50 active Revenants.

Passive.Name: Wet Paintbrush
Passive.Description: Attacks cause enemies to be slowed by 30% for 5 seconds. If the enemy is already slowed, they take 5% more damage.

Passive.Name: Blame it on the Boogie
Passive.Description: Attacks stun enemies for 1 second, if stunned twice the stun deals 25% more damage.

Passive.Name: Overcooked Kebab
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 30% Burn Damage Over 3 Seconds

Ability1.Name: Sawing A Volunteer In Half
Ability1.Description: The clowns pick exactly one lucky volunteer for tonight's show: the most dangerous enemy in range. The trick goes precisely as rehearsed, dealing 0.9x current Damage. It is not a trick.

Passive.Name: Fun And Games
Passive.Description: Clown Ralsei, Clown Susie, And Clown Kris, alongside their circus tent apply 10% Soulleak, 30% Slow, and 10% Burn for 2s to all enemies hit.

Passive.Name: Waveshredder
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow enemies by 40% for 2 seconds, Applies 10% Drown to all enemies hit for 1 second.

Ability1.Name: POOL'S CLOSED, LOSERS
Ability1.Description: One whistle blast. That's all the warning anyone gets before Lifeguard Susie shoves every enemy in range into the Deep End at once, dealing 1.09x current Damage. Can't be used again for 4.7s. No refunds on pool passes.

Passive.Name: Whistle
Passive.Description: Attacks Stun enemies for 1 second, Attacks apply 20% Drown to all enemies hit for 2 seconds.

Mighty Mo (BB-63).VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: The Mighty Mo has entered the battlefield.
Mighty Mo (BB-63).VoiceLineAttackCaptions: Firing mechanism reset! Secure the hatch!... Port Side Ready!
Mighty Mo (BB-63).VoiceLineSellCaptions: They ain't gonna sink this battleship, no way.
Mighty Mo (BB-63).VoiceLinePassive1Captions: Let's drop some lead on those mother- FIRE!

Ability1.Name: GENERAL QUARTERS, ALL HANDS!
Ability1.Description: Every battery answers at once. Mighty Mo (BB-63) walks a full curtain of shellfire across all enemies in range, dealing 2.07x current Damage. The gun crews are reloading. Can't be used again for 4.6s.

Ability2.Name: SECURE THE HATCH!
Ability2.Description: Firing mechanism reset, hatch dogged tight, port side ready. One 16-inch shell goes point-blank into the most dangerous enemy in range, and only that one, for 1.91x current Damage.

Ability3.Name: The Dent She Kept
Ability3.Description: Mo took a hit off Okinawa once and wears the scar in her hull to this day. Now she returns the favor with interest, strewing burning shrapnel over the whole spread that deals 2.57x current Damage total over 9.2s to every enemy caught in it.

Passive.Name: Art Of War
Passive.Description: The legendary battleship fights with every battery online, commanded by Admiral Ralsei. Every 45 seconds, BB-63 unleashes a devastating 9-gun broadside, firing 16-Inch High Explosive shells that deal Explosive Nuke AoE damage equal to x15 current Damage and inflict +200% Burn for 1.5 seconds. Every 3 seconds, her 5-inch secondary battery fires explosive shells that deal 3x current Damage, briefly Stunning enemies for 0.2s. Her primary attack uses rapid-fire 40mm Bofors cannons, dealing Pierce damage using her current Damage, Cooldown, and Range.

Tobias Foxington.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: I thought this was next week.
Tobias Foxington.VoiceLineAttackCaptions: Please enjoy this completely intentional feature.
Tobias Foxington.Ability2VoicelineCaptions: Clever foxes take what they're owed.

Ability1.Name: Removed In The Latest Patch
Ability1.Description: One entity, the most dangerous enemy in range, is quietly deprecated for 1.25x current Damage. This change was not listed in the patch notes and will not be acknowledged.

Ability2.Name: The Kickstarter Refund
Ability2.Description: Tobias plucks a single offender, the strongest enemy in range, clean out of the build, dealing 2.77x current Damage and refunding 8% of that as bonus cash. Thank you for backing this project. The announcement remains postponed.

Ability3.Name: LOADING... (DO NOT CLOSE THE GAME)
Ability3.Description: A progress bar crawls across everything caught in his segment for 9.7s, dealing 0.71x current Damage per second to all of it. It has been at 90% for a while now. It will stay at 90%.

Passive.Name: DELTARUNE TOMORROW!!!
Passive.Description: Every 25 seconds, Tobias Foxington accidentally leaks content from a future update, randomly Plucking a unit from the entire obtainable roster. The selected unit is deployed at its maximum Upgrade Level and inherits Tobias Foxington's Enchantment, Shiny status, and any active buffs. Plucked units remain for 20 seconds. Maximum 3 globally active Plucked units at once.

Ceroba Ketsukane.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: For Kanako... I'll do what must be done.
Ceroba Ketsukane.Ability1VoicelineCaptions: Forgive me… ruin is the only way.

Ability1.Name: You Leave Me No Choice
Ability1.Description: Ceroba lowers her mask, and her staff falls like a verdict on one head alone: the most dangerous enemy in range, dealing 0.84x current Damage. For Kanako. It was always for Kanako.

Ability2.Name: What Chujin Left Behind
Ability2.Description: Ceroba puts her late husband's handiwork to use one more time, summoning help with 1.71x its current Damage as Health that fights beside her for 6.9s. He always did build things to outlast him.

Ability3.Name: Foxfire Doesn't Forgive
Ability3.Description: A ring of quiet, patient flame spreads from her staff across the ground for 10.1s, searing everything it touches for 0.71x current Damage per second. It burns the way grief does: slowly, and all the way down.

Passive.Name: Kitsune's Wrath
Passive.Description: Every 7th Attack Deals 777% More Damage And Applies 4s Darkened Stun.

Flowey The Flower.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: Howdy! I'm Flowey. Flowey the Flower!
Flowey The Flower.VoiceLineAttackCaptions: In this world, it's kill or be killed!

Ability1.Name: Catch As Many As You Can!
Ability1.Description: Little white "friendliness pellets" drift down the vines toward everything they've snagged for 3.8s, dealing 0.76x current Damage per second to each and every one lucky enough to catch some.

Ability2.Name: You Know What's Going On Here, Don't You?
Ability2.Description: A slow ring of pellets closes in around every enemy in range until there is nowhere left for any of them to run, dealing 2.56x current Damage to them all. Can't be used again for 7.2s.

Passive.Name: An Old Friend Returns
Passive.Description: Attacks Chain Up To 5 Different Enemies. Every 25s Flowey Grabs a Random Enemy With Vines, Dealing 3x Damage And Stunning Them For 5s.

Ability1.Name: Held At Gunpoint
Ability1.Description: Clover tips their hat and says nothing. Everything caught under the brim's shadow, all of it, is Held At Gunpoint for 3.7s, taking 0.47x current Damage per second while nobody dares to move.

Ability2.Name: WANTED: BACKUP
Ability2.Description: Clover pins a wordless WANTED poster to the air, and the Wild East answers. A deputy rides in, summoned with 1.48x Clover's current Damage as Health, and holds the line for 7.9s.

Ability3.Name: JUSTICE Doesn't Say Goodbye
Ability3.Description: High noon arrives early. A yellow, wordless blaze wakes in the dirt beneath Clover and smolders there for 7.5s, scorching anything and everything that stands in it for 1.27x current Damage per second.

Passive.Name: Determined Gunslinger
Passive.Description: Every 30s Clover Channels A Rapid-Fire Barrage Dealing 4x Pierce Damage To The Nearest Enemy Every 0.25s For 3s. Attacks Apply 150% Darkness For 1 Second.

Ability1.Name: HOOOSH!!
Ability1.Description: Dalv flings his cape wide and a midnight cloudburst crashes down, cold as a coffin lid, drenching every enemy in range at once for 1.57x current Damage. Can't be used again for 4.3s.

Passive.Name: Vampire's Curse
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow Enemies By 45% For 2.5 Seconds. Dalv Deals 50% More Damage At Night.

Zenith Martlet.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: I won't let anyone else get hurt!

Ability1.Name: Hold Still, It's A Puzzle!
Ability1.Description: Her old puzzle instincts fire wrong. Zenith Martlet traces one golden sightline across the path, and everything standing on the solution takes 0.54x current Damage per second for 3.3s.

Ability2.Name: The Sky Comes Down
Ability2.Description: Golden wings fold, and the whole sky seems to drop with her, crushing all enemies in range where she lands for 1.47x current Damage.

Ability3.Name: NOBODY ELSE GETS HURT.
Ability3.Description: Vines of hardened gold cage every enemy in range for 7.8s while she whispers apologies through the bars, then clamp shut for 1.9x current Damage on each as they wither.

Passive.Name: Wings Of Gold
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 70% Slow For 3s. Every 10s Zenith Martlet Dives, Dealing 6x Damage As Pierce Spread To The Nearest Group Of Enemies. (Max 12 Enemies Hit)

Ability1.Name: ¡EL ZAPATEADO FINAL!
Ability1.Description: El Bailador declares the whole battlefield his stage. Heels hammer a rhythm so fierce the ground learns the steps, shaking all enemies in range for 0.96x current Damage. Can't be used again for 4s. ¡Olé!

Passive.Name: Flamenco Fury
Passive.Description: El Bailador Spawns Up To 4 Dancer Clones That Each Deal 0.5x His Current Damage Every 0.5s In Single Target.

Ability1.Name: TOO!! LOUD!!
Ability1.Description: Decibat finally snaps and shrieks back. One ear-inverting screech, cranked until the air itself files a complaint, blasts every enemy in range for 0.98x current Damage. Can't be used again for 5s.

Passive.Name: Sonic Screech
Passive.Description: Decibat Deals 175% More Damage To Enemies That Are Actively Stunned Or Have Darkness Applied To Them.

Ceroba.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: I'll protect this place, no matter the cost.

Ability1.Name: No Matter The Cost
Ability1.Description: A bell chimes once, a fan of foxfire narrows to a single point, and one enemy alone, the most dangerous in range, takes 1x current Damage. She made a promise.

Ability2.Name: The Mask Stays On
Ability2.Description: Behind the kitsune mask, guilt sharpens into aim. Ceroba runs the strongest enemy in range through with one clean thrust for 2.03x current Damage, and 8% of it comes back as bonus cash, set aside the way she once saved everything for Kanako.

Passive.Name: Devoted Protector
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 40% SoulLeak For 3s. Every 3rd Attack Deals 275% More Damage And Applies 2s Darkened Stun.

Ability1.Name: GREETINGS. YOU ARE CONTRABAND.
Ability1.Description: AXIS IDENTIFIES ONE (1) TARGET, the most dangerous enemy in range, AS: CONTRABAND. CONTRABAND WILL BE VAPORIZED, dealing 1.3x current Damage. HAVE A PLEASANT DAY, CITIZEN.

Ability2.Name: ERROR: COOLANT NOT FOUND
Ability2.Description: AXIS IS FINE. THE FLOOR IS NOT. Leaking soul energy sears the ground beneath him for 6.4s, scalding every enemy standing in the spill for 0.79x current Damage per second. THIS IS PART OF THE EXPERIMENT.

Ability3.Name: SOUL ENERGY: MAXIMUM!
Ability3.Description: AXIS EXCEEDS RECOMMENDED PARAMETERS. INTENTIONALLY. His core overdrives, flooding a piercing surge through every enemy caught in the radius for 7s, dealing 1.36x current Damage per second. FAILURE IS NOT AN OPT... RECALCULATING.

Passive.Name: Soul Overload
Passive.Description: Every 60s Axis Charges For 5s Then Unleashes A Soul Explosion, Dealing 6x His Current Damage Every 0.25s As Pierce Spread For 7s. Axis Cannot Attack While Charging Or Using Soul Overload.

Kitsune Queen.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: Behold the power of the Nine Tails!
Kitsune Queen.VoiceLineSellCaptions: The world is not ready for me.

Ability1.Name: All Nine, At Once
Ability1.Description: Nine tails, nine arcs of kitsunebi, one burning fan swept across every enemy in range, dealing 1.25x current Damage. The world wasn't ready. Can't be used again for 3.1s.

Ability2.Name: Fate Has Teeth
Ability2.Description: The Queen did warn you: you cannot outrun fate. A single spectral fang finds the most dangerous enemy in range wherever it hides and closes down for 1.86x current Damage.

Ability3.Name: The Hundred-Year Dream
Ability3.Description: Every enemy in range is Spellbound inside a fox-dream where the war already ended and they won, held motionless for 9.8s. Waking up costs each of them 2.48x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Nine Tails Dominion
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 85% Slow for 3s. Each attack has the chance to strike between 1 and 9 times, Alongside the full Pierce Spread Damage. Every strike deals 100% of this unit's current Damage as Single-target damage to a random enemy within range.

Passive.Name: Steam Vents
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 125% Burn Damage Over 1.5 Seconds. Deals x2 More Damage To Enemies That Are Actively Being Burned.

Passive.Name: Tiny But Mighty
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 20% For 1.5 Seconds.

Passive.Name: Hotland Hustle
Passive.Description: Gains 750->1500 Cash Every 10 Seconds.

Ability1.Name: INVASIVE SPECIES DETECTED
Ability1.Description: Guardener's sensors flag the most dangerous enemy in range as a weed and administer corrective pruning: one thorned vine driven clean through that single offending growth, dealing 1.48x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Steamworks Sentinel
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 100% Anti Regen For 3s. Every 35s Guardener Overcharges, Dealing A 5x AOE Attack Of Its Current Damage.

Ability1.Name: One Puzzle, One Solution
Ability1.Description: Martlet treats the most dangerous enemy in range like one of her beloved puzzles. Study it, line it up, solve it. The answer arrives as a single decisive strike for 1.18x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: Feathered Citizen's Arrest
Ability2.Description: By order of the Royal Guard, every enemy in range is grounded beneath a drift of pinning feathers for 8.2s. Release from custody comes with a fine of 1.75x current Damage each.

Passive.Name: Royal Guard Captain
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 50% Slow For 2s. Every 20s Martlet Dashes Through All Enemies In Range, Dealing 3x Pierce Spread Damage.

North Star.VoiceLineAttackCaptions: This power was never meant for you!

Ability1.Name: Stars Don't Blink
Ability1.Description: North Star's light settles over every enemy in range and refuses to move on for 4.8s, pressing down at 0.35x current Damage per second. It was watching you long before you looked up.

Ability2.Name: Nova, Personally
Ability2.Description: Nothing lasts forever. North Star proves it, going nova across every enemy in range for 1.58x current Damage, then calmly reassembling. Nothing lasts forever. Except them.

Ability3.Name: Written Into The Sky
Ability3.Description: Every enemy in range is pinned in place as a point in North Star's own constellation for 7.4s. When their stars are allowed to fall, each takes 1.5x current Damage. This power was never meant for you.

Passive.Name: Photon Collapse
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 65% For 5s. Every 45s North Star Fires A Devastating Caliber Of Bullets, Dealing 10x Damage And Stunning All Enemies In Range For 10s.

Passive.Name: Shop Special
Passive.Description: The Snowdin Merchants Gain 0.5% Damage For Every Enemy Killed (Max 50%) And 0.5% For Every 1 Base HP Lost.

Passive.Name: Band Practice
Passive.Description: The Snowdin Merchants Gain 0.5% Damage For Every Enemy Killed (Max 50%) And 0.5% For Every 1 Base HP Lost.

Passive.Name: Slime Coat
Passive.Description: Enemies Hit By Slurpy Are Marked. Marked Enemies Take 25% More Damage From All Sources For 3s.

Passive.Name: Dusty Remains
Passive.Description: The Ruins Monsters Gain 0.5% Damage For Every Enemy Killed (Max 50%) And 0.5% For Every 1 Base HP Lost.

Passive.Name: Snowdin Locals
Passive.Description: Attacks Hit Twice If Paired With Dunebud.

Passive.Name: Desert Bloom
Passive.Description: Attacks Hit Twice If Paired With Mo.

Passive.Name: Cornered
Passive.Description: Attacks Stun Enemies For 0.5s.

Passive.Name: Serpent Strike
Passive.Description: Every 3rd Attack Deals x2 More Damage.

Passive.Name: Big Leap
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 2x Damage To Enemies 15 Range Or Closer.

Ability1.Name: One... Two... THREE!
Ability1.Description: Starlo counts it out like a proper duel, and on THREE, one shot rings out and the most dangerous enemy in range eats hot iron for 1.55x current Damage. That's how they do it in the Wild East.

Ability2.Name: The Ol' Wild East Hog-Tie
Ability2.Description: Starlo ropes every enemy in range into one big hog-tie and tips his hat for 8.3s. The moment that knot gives, each critter takes 2.37x current Damage on the way out.

Passive.Name: Sheriff Of The Dunes
Passive.Description: Every 15s Starlo Calls In A Posse, Eliminating A Random Enemy In Range And Stunning All Remaining Enemies In Range For 1.5s.

Ability1.Name: DEAD MAN'S HAND
Ability1.Description: Ace shows their cards: all in, no bluff, table's on fire. Then they cash out the most dangerous enemy in range, and only them, with a haymaker worth 1.15x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Wild Card
Passive.Description: Every hit sears the target, dealing 200% Burn Damage over 3 Seconds.

Passive.Name: Petal Shower
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 100% Burn Damage Over 3 Seconds.

Ability1.Name: DON'T PUT YOUR HAND IN THE HOLE
Ability1.Description: Moray has been coiled in that crack in the dark the whole time. Its jaws pick out the most dangerous enemy in range, one bite, one victim, dealing 1.59x current Damage, then slide back in to wait.

Passive.Name: Deep Strike
Passive.Description: Attacks Deal 225% Burn Damage Over 1s. Enemies Hit Are Darkened Stunned For 3s.

Passive.Name: Mirror Madness
Passive.Description: Summons Two Mirror Copies That Each Deal 2000->4500 Every 0.5s In Splash.

Passive.Name: Desert Thorns
Passive.Description: Enemies In Range Are Slowed By 35% For 5s. Boosts All Towers In Range For A 30% Range Boost (60% If Shiny).

Passive.Name: Ruins Hymn
Passive.Description: All Towers In Range Are Given A 16% Cooldown Reduction (32% If Shiny).

Passive.Name: Leaflet Drop
Passive.Description: Applies 50% AOE Anti Regen Every 2s For 5s. All Units In Range Are Given A +25% Damage Boost (50% Shiny).

Ability1.Name: Mandatory Donation Drive
Ability1.Description: Mooch passes the collection cup to every enemy in range and does not wait for a yes; each one gets shaken down for 1.09x current Damage. Can't be used again for 3.5s. She'll pay you back, promise.

Passive.Name: Freeloading
Passive.Description: Increases Your 5th Unit's Placement By +1. Attacks Apply 0.5s Stun.

Passive.Name: Cold Knowledge
Passive.Description: The Closer An Enemy Is, The More Damage Know Cone Deals (1% Per 1 Range, Max 50%). Gains +1% Damage For Every 2 Enemies Killed (Max 50%).

Passive.Name: Everyone Knows Frostermit
Passive.Description: Frostermit Does Very Little, But It Shows Up Everywhere.

Ability1.Name: PILE ON, BOYS!!
Ability1.Description: Ed hollers for his brothers, and three ornery bodies flatten one unlucky soul, the most dangerous enemy in range, from three directions at once, dealing 0.86x current Damage. No refunds on the fourth.

Passive.Name: Feisty Four
Passive.Description: Attacks Hit Twice And Apply 0.5s Stun.

Passive.Name: Sand Hound
Passive.Description: Deals 50% More Damage If Paired With Any Other Dunes Units.
