Passive.Name: Desert Scholar
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 10% SoulLeak And 20% Anti Regen For 2 Seconds.

Passive.Name: Broadcast Wave
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 50% For 4 Seconds.

Passive.Name: Triple Threat
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 80% Slow For 1 Second.

Passive.Name: Steamworks Model
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 55% Slow For 2 Seconds.

Goosic.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: La la la... oh! Sorry, didn't see you!

Passive.Name: Steamworks Symphony
Passive.Description: Spawns Two Goose Turrets That Each Deal The Unit's Current Damage In Single Target Every 0.5s. Every 25s Goosic Honks Loudly, Summoning A Random Enemy At A Random Exit With 15x Their Damage As HP.

Ability1.Name: Serum Draft #1: UNSTABLE
Ability1.Description: Chujin channels an unfinished draft of his soul-power serum into a single test subject: the most dangerous enemy in range. The formula was never meant for this, dealing 1.12x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: Field Test: The Stasis Rig
Ability2.Description: Chujin switches on a stasis rig he never got to perfect, locking every enemy in range in suspension for 9.5s. Like most of his inventions, it fails violently, dealing 2.05x current Damage to each when it does.

Passive.Name: Royal Scientist's Will
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 100% Anti-Regen For 5s. Deals 2x Damage And 1s Stun If Paired With Any Ceroba Unit.

Kanako Ketsukane.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: I just want everyone to be okay.
Kanako Ketsukane.VoiceLineSellCaptions: I'll be fine. I always am.

Ability1.Name: Borrowed Foxfire
Ability1.Description: Kanako shuts her eyes and lets go of the foxfire her family taught her to hold in, a soft, sorry blaze that washes over every enemy in range for 1.68x current Damage. Can't be used again for 4.5s.

Ability2.Name: What Determination Leaves Behind
Ability2.Description: The Determination that unmade Kanako seeps out where she stands, and it does not forgive. Every enemy caught in the spreading spill slowly melts, taking 2.76x current Damage total over 9.4s.

Passive.Name: Pure Soul
Passive.Description: Kanako Heals Nearby Allied Units For 5% Of Their Max HP Every 20s. Attacks Apply 30% SoulLeak For 2s.

Passive.Name: Can't Sleep
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 35% Slow For 2s. Deals 75% More Damage To Enemies Below 50% HP.

Passive.Name: Mechanical Mutt
Passive.Description: Deals 50% More Damage If Paired With Any Other Steamworks Units.

Passive.Name: Ancient Text
Passive.Description: The Longer An Enemy Is Targeted, The More Damage It Takes (1% Per Second, Max 100%).

Passive.Name: Special Delivery
Passive.Description: Every 20s Mail Whale Drops A Package On The Nearest Enemy, Dealing 5x Damage And Stunning Them For 3s.

Passive.Name: High Stakes
Passive.Description: Every 5th Attack Is A Critical Strike Dealing 3x Damage.

Meta Flowey.VoiceLineSellCaptions: This isn't the end... it's never the end.

Ability1.Name: The Vines Get There First
Ability1.Description: In this world it's kill or be killed, and Meta Flowey's vines get there first, singling out the most dangerous enemy in range and crushing it for 1.57x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: Don't You Have Anything Better To Do?
Ability2.Description: Meta Flowey pauses the game. Every enemy in range hangs mid-frame for 6.8s while he savors it, then takes 1.23x current Damage the instant he presses play.

Ability3.Name: Six SOULs, One Owner
Ability3.Description: Meta Flowey dangles a stolen SOUL over an open save file, and something climbs out after it, a helper with 1.81x his current Damage as Health that fights at his side for 7.6s before he files it away again.

Passive.Name: LOAD
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 65% For 5s. Every 45s Meta Flowey Resets, Dealing 10x Damage And Stunning All Enemies In Range For 10s.

Pink.VoiceLineAttack3Captions: You're making my body's heart... go funny!! D... die!
Pink.VoiceLineSellCaptions: I could be an ANIMATED CATGIRL!!! Why do you twerps have to take that away!?
Pink.VoiceLineIdle1Captions: This body... it still... feels doki's for you.
Pink.VoiceLineIdle2Captions: I want to be a real girl!

Ability1.Name: KISSY CUTIE, CLAWS OUT
Ability1.Description: Pink singles out the most dangerous enemy in range and pounces, mew-first, claws very much out, dealing 0.92x current Damage. Mewers, clip that.

Ability2.Name: SMOTHERED WITH LOVE
Ability2.Description: Pink scoops every enemy in range into one doting group hug and does not let go for 5.9s. When she finally does, the affection leaves a mark of 2.05x current Damage each. She loves you. Hold still.

Ability3.Name: Subscribe Or Else, Twerp
Ability3.Description: Pink corners the strongest enemy in range, just the two of them, and shakes them down for everything they've got, dealing 2.5x current Damage. 6% of it flows back to you as donations from the adoring Mewers.

Passive.Name: Mewers Live
Passive.Description: Attacks Stun Enemies For 1 Second. Whenever Pink defeats a Mini-Boss or Boss, she gains 1 Doki. For every 5 Doki accumulated, all allied units within range gain +10% Damage. Additionally, every 30 seconds, Pink has a 30% chance to split into two, summoning a grey colored duplicate adjacent to herself for 15 seconds. The duplicate inherits Pink's current stats, modifiers, buffs/debuffs and cannot create additional duplicates.

Flowery.VoiceLinePlace3Captions: Hey guys! I think I found a glue!
Flowery.VoiceLineIdle4Captions: I'm only trying to help you.
Flowery.VoiceLineIdle18Captions: Sorry to keep a lady in waiting!
Flowery.VoiceLineIdle42Captions: I'm sorry once again, I kept a lady in waiting!

Ability1.Name: Jarona!! (Seven Times, No Less)
Ability1.Description: Flowery lowers his bright yellow head and charges the lane seven times over, exactly as rehearsed with Orange and Green, trampling every enemy in range for 1.55x current Damage. Can't be used again for 3.5s.

Ability2.Name: Vines, Mind the Blue Parts
Ability2.Description: Flowery sends rank after rank of vines sweeping across the board, raking everything caught among them for 2.86x current Damage total over 9.8s. The blue sections are perfectly safe to dash through. He is not going to tell them that.

Passive.Name: NOBODY IS FASTER THAN A FLOWER!
Passive.Description: For every allied Flower-type unit within Flowery's range, Flowery gains +10% Damage. Every 30 seconds, Flowery randomly selects an allied unit within range and chaotically rewrites one of its stats, setting either its Damage, Range, or Cooldown to a random value between 0 and 999,999,999 for 10 seconds.

Ability1.Name: Tonight's Special (He Insists)
Ability1.Description: Green says nothing, plates a piping-hot course from his own garden, and serves it directly to the most dangerous enemy in range for 0.98x current Damage. He waits for them to finish. He nods once.

Passive.Name: <- Green
Passive.Description: Green mimics the current Damage of all nearby allied units in range, converting it into Healing Power (up to 1,100 HP per second) and restoring that Health to each respective unit.

Ability1.Name: I'M NOT SCARED!! (Don't Ask Twice)
Ability1.Description: Orange squares her shoulders, announces very loudly that this is fine, and slams headlong into the most dangerous enemy in range, going off in two back-to-back bursts for 1.38x current Damage. She was a little scared. Nobody mention it.

Passive.Name: HotHeaded Bravery
Passive.Description: The more damage orange takes, the more damage she does. This has no limit!

Ability1.Name: Pirouette in Fifth Position
Ability1.Description: Blue rises to pointe and turns one flawless, unhurried pirouette; the ripple of it steadies every allied tower on the field and lashes every enemy in range for 1.34x current Damage. Discipline is a kindness. Can't be used again for 4.8s.

Passive.Name: Love Prevails
Passive.Description: Blue heals all units in range by 10% of their current health every 30s, Blue also heals the base by 2.5% of its current health every 60s

Ability1.Name: Guilty, Says Me
Ability1.Description: Yellow consults a personal and highly unofficial book of law, finds the most dangerous enemy in range guilty as charged, and puts one Justice Round clean through 'em and every varmint lined up behind 'em, dealing 1.42x current Damage. Court's adjourned.

Passive.Name: Stop, Criminell!
Passive.Description: Every 15s Yellow lasso's a random enemy, instantly killing them. (Bosses Excluded)

Passive.Name: Potted Plant
Passive.Description: Attacks Slow By 20% For 1.5 Seconds, and chain up to 6 enemies.

Ability1.Name: A Bouquet, Just For You
Ability1.Description: The Flower King's garden falls silent as he snips a single golden stem and presents it, thorns first, to the most dangerous enemy in range, dealing 1.23x current Damage. Do stay for tea.

Passive.Name: Dreamwatchers
Passive.Description: The Flower King summons seven flowers, each of a different color, that independently attack enemies using Single-target Damage.

Ability1.Name: Chapter Twelve Covers This, Probably
Ability1.Description: Seth cross-references three tactics manuals mid-sentence and executes footnote four on the most dangerous enemy in range, a studied thrust that punches clean through for 0.92x current Damage. Sorry! Sorry. He did cite his sources.

Passive.Name: Uhm.. L-Let me put my knowledge to use!
Passive.Description: Every 60 seconds, Seth randomizes the Attack Type of all allied units within range for 15 seconds. Once the effect ends, each unit's Attack Type returns to its original form.

Ability1.Name: Never Tried THIS Before!
Ability1.Description: Aqua has absolutely no idea if this move works, which is exactly why she tries it, carving a brand-new razor-edged wave across the most dangerous enemy in range for 1.34x current Damage. New favorite technique. Until tomorrow's.

Passive.Name: Play! Play! Asgore Lets Play!
Passive.Description: Every 30 seconds, Aqua mimics the current Damage of a random allied unit within range, including all active buffs and modifiers, then unleashes a Slash attack dealing 2× the copied Damage.

Passive.Name: Can you get me a hot gamer boyfriend.
Passive.Description: Every 3rd Attack has a 25% chance to deal 2x damage.

Passive.Name: Sharp Scissors
Passive.Description: Attacks Apply 25% Anti-Regen for 3 seconds

Netskie.Type: Cone Aoe + Damage & Cooldown Booster + Passive

Passive.Name: Swishes My Big FLuffy $$$$-ing Tail
Passive.Description: All Towers In Range Are Given 10% Damage Boost (20% If Shiny, And 2.5% Cooldown Reduct (5% If Shiny). Every 15s, Netskie produces a huge Cone Aoe attack with 50 range, dealing 2x her current damage to enemies hit.

Passive.Name: Intimidate
Passive.Description: All Units In Range Get A 25% (50% Shiny) Damage Boost. The longer shi targets an enemy, the more damage it can recieve from all units, 1% every second, bosses are not affected. (Max 250%)

Passive.Name: Leafing Already?
Passive.Description: Attacks blow enemies backwards 5 studs, and stun them for 0.1s

Passive.Name: *licking noises*
Passive.Description: KawKaw Licks enemies, dealing 40% Slow.

Ability1.Name: Susie Decks Them (Noelle Says Sorry)
Ability1.Description: Susie hops off the float to personally greet the most dangerous enemy in range with her fist, one guest of honor only, while Noelle waves apologetically to the crowd, dealing 0.98x current Damage.

Ability2.Name: ROYAL PHOTO OP! NOBODY MOVE!
Ability2.Description: Every enemy in range gets pulled into the Queens' commemorative festival photo and held in pose for 9s. The flash goes off, the crowd cheers, and each one takes 3.26x current Damage.

Passive.Name: Everybody! Meet Your Festival Queens! Noelle & Susie!
Passive.Description: Attacks Hit Twice, Every 45 seconds, Susie weaponizes Noelle by wrapping her in Christmas lights before launching her through the battlefield. Upon impact, Noelle crashes into enemies, dealing 10× current Damage in a Nuke Damage.

Ability1.Name: GARBAGE DAY COMES FOR US ALL
Ability1.Description: Trashy tips over, Little Ball picks up speed, and Nubert simply arrives, burying every enemy in range under a full week of collectible refuse for 0.98x current Damage. Can't be used again for 3.1s.

Passive.Name: Nubert's Goin' Further Beyond!
Passive.Description: Trashy slows all enemies within range by 35%, while Little Ball unleashes a devastating strike every other attack, dealing 3× Damage. Every 60 seconds, Nubert ascends Further Beyond, increasing the Damage of all allied units within range by 300% for 10 seconds.

Passive.Name: These birds are tropissing me off I am the tropical Starwalker
Passive.Description: Attacks that hit air enemies have a 25% chance to turn them into ground enemies.

Omega Flowery.VoiceLinePlace3Captions: Hey guys! I think I found a glue!
Omega Flowery.VoiceLineIdle4Captions: I'm only trying to help you.
Omega Flowery.VoiceLineIdle18Captions: Sorry to keep a lady in waiting!
Omega Flowery.VoiceLineIdle42Captions: I'm sorry once again, I kept a lady in waiting!

Ability1.Name: Seven Colors, One Thorn
Ability1.Description: Every flower in the bouquet pours its light down a single thorned lance, and it pins the most dangerous enemy in range for 1.57x current Damage. It was grown for a wedding. It can still hold a point.

Ability2.Name: No Way Through But Through
Ability2.Description: Walls of blue light slam down around every enemy in range and hold for 7.3s; without an orange SOUL, nobody is dashing out of those. When the walls finally fall, each trapped enemy takes 2.99x current Damage.

Ability3.Name: 111% TP
Ability3.Description: Flowery spends everything at once, shining with all the colors of all seven flowers, and that borrowed brilliance breaks like a wave over every enemy in range for 3.58x current Damage. It costs more than he has; it always did. Can't be used again for 10.3s.

Passive.Name: Watch and learn, Kris... The TRUE power of friendship!
Passive.Description: Omega Flowery has a 50/50 chance every attack to either use his real stats, or his fake stats. Upon reaching max level, Omega Flowery makes a Vine Fountain every 360 seconds, dealing 999999999 AoE damage (Bosses only take 999999) and stunning all enemies in range for 15 seconds.

Pirate Gaster.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: ALL THOSE PLAYERS NEVER TREAT ME RIGHT
Pirate Gaster.VoiceLineAttackCaptions: WHAT I TRULY MEANT IN MY OLD ENTRY SEVENTEEN!
Pirate Gaster.VoiceLineSellCaptions: WE KIDNAPPED ALL OF DELTARUNE, AND STOLEN UNDERTALE!
Pirate Gaster.Ability1VoicelineCaptions: AYE, WE PLUNDER ROOT BEER, AND OF COURSE WE PLUNDER ALE!
Pirate Gaster.Ability2VoicelineCaptions: WE'LL SEAL YOUR HOME FOR GOOD AND TAKE AWAY YOUR HOLY LIGHT!
Pirate Gaster.Ability3VoicelineCaptions: LET'S GET DOWN TO BUSINESS AND VALUE, VALUE THE FUN!

Ability1.Name: Cannonball Of FUN!
Ability1.Description: Pirate Gaster launches a cannonball of FUN! at a random enemy in range, dealing 10x Single Damage.

Ability2.Name: Sea Sickness
Ability2.Description: All enemies in range get Sea Sick for 5s, dealing 2x damage per second and reducing their movement speed by 50%.

Ability3.Name: A PIRATE IS NOTHING WITHOUT HIS BIRD!
Ability3.Description: Pirate Gaster throws NORMAL_NPC at the closet enemy, causing NORMAL_NPC to eat them, instantly killing them, and damaging 25x damage to all nearby enemies.

Passive.Name: BRUSH THOSE THEORIES OFF NOW, OUR MYSTERY MYSTERY MAN!
Passive.Description: Enemies defeated by Pirate Gaster are transformed into Ghouls, retaining 75% of their maximum Health. Ghouls remain on the battlefield as living traps. When an enemy collides with a Ghoul, the Ghoul deals Damage equal to its remaining Health. If the enemy is defeated, the Ghoul survives with its remaining Health and can continue attacking. If the enemy survives, the Ghoul is destroyed after dealing all of its remaining Health as Damage, dropping 250,000 D$ upon defeat. Additionally, every 30 seconds, Pirate Gaster unleashes a sweeping hook slash, dealing 10× current Damage in a large Cone AoE.

The Forgotten Man.VoiceLinePlaceCaptions: Cats can be nasty creatures, can't they?
The Forgotten Man.VoiceLineAttackCaptions: And when they find you, they bite... very, VERY, hard.
The Forgotten Man.VoiceLineSellCaptions: {PLAYERNAME}, if you have any protein, you must keep it hidden, and never let anyone see it.
The Forgotten Man.Ability1VoicelineCaptions: The cats are not too smart, but once they find a target, they never stop chasing it until they get bored.
The Forgotten Man.Ability2VoicelineCaptions: Some people would do anything to get away from them, even change their appearance, or go into hiding...
The Forgotten Man.Ability3VoicelineCaptions: Of course, cats are fickle creatures, but they were very good at finding protein.

Ability1.Description: The Forgotten Man hands you a mysterious egg, marking a single enemy as his target. For 15 seconds, all allied units will focus their attacks on the chosen enemy, dealing 2x damage to them.

Ability2.Description: The Forgotten Man fractures reality around nearby enemies, shattering them into unstable fragments. Affected enemies have their maximum health and movement speed reduced by 50% for 10 seconds.

Ability3.Description: The Forgotten Man tears the power from nearby allies' souls, absorbing their current damage and adding it to his own. For 10 seconds, his damage is increased by the combined power of all affected units, amplified by 5x.

Passive.Name: Lost where the forest would grow, the children followed the pointed tail.
Passive.Description: The forgotten man places 5 eggs on the battlefield every 60 seconds, if an enemy touches these eggs, they are targeted by the hoard of friendlings, dealing 10x current Damage to them with the current drain time, and lowering their max health and speed by 25% forever.
